mapper.sql: SELECT hd.house_id, hd.deal_type, hd.deal_amount, hd.deposit_amount, hd.monthly_rent, hd.deal_date, hd.area, hd.floor, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hd.house_id ORDER BY hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC) AS rn FROM house_deal hd
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM house h INNER JOIN (
) ld ON ld.house_id = h.house_id AND ld.rn = 1
SELECT house_id AS houseId, apt_name AS aptName, region_code AS regionCode, jibun, build_year AS buildYear, house_type AS houseType, latitude, longitude FROM house WHERE house_id = #{houseId}

SELECT deal_id AS dealId, deal_type AS dealType, deal_amount AS dealAmount, deposit_amount AS depositAmount, monthly_rent AS monthlyRent, deal_date AS dealDate, area, floor FROM house_deal WHERE house_id = #{houseId} ORDER BY deal_date DESC, deal_id DESC
